title: blechnum productum
intro: Blechnum productum, also known as the rusty water fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Blechnum productum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a treatment for skin conditions like eczema. Herbal preparations of Blechnum productum are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
